articles.title: Fifth member of Iranian women's soccer team gives up asylum in Australia - PBS
articles.description: A fifth member of the Iranian women’s soccer team who accepted a refugee visa to stay in Australia has left the country, the Australian government said on Monday.
articles.content:
MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) A fifth member of the Iranian women's soccer team who accepted a refugee visa to stay in Australia has left the country, the Australian government said on Monday.
